name: Kirincic Natural Convection Reference — Low Delta T
description: Vertical natural-convection plate-fin heatsink reference mapped from Kirincic et al. (2025), low temperature-difference case.

provenance.citation: Kirincic, M., Fadiga, T., and Delac, B. (2025). Experimental-Numerical Investigation of Natural Convection from a Plate Fin Heat Sink with Correlation Assessment. Thermo, 5(4), 57.
provenance.notes: Expected outputs are taken from the Section 7 low-delta-T endpoint (Q = 9.47 W, Delta T = 21 C, h = 5.48 W/m^2K, R = 2.22 K/W). Tolerances are intentionally broad because the paper combines experiment and CFD while the tool is a reduced-order correlation model.

notes: The paper describes a bare-aluminum passive heatsink but does not specify an alloy, so the tool uses 201 W/m K and emissivity 0.10 as a practical bare-aluminum approximation.
